title: Time Tracking by Board

posts.author: amywong (Amy Wong)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello!

I need to know how much I should be billing my clients for the time that we’re working for them. My clients are organized as boards within my workspace.

The only way that I can aggregate time is by person, but I think you should expand it, so that it shows it by board or project. That ways, people can see how much time is spent on a specific project at a glance – preferably on the dashboard. I am working with around 30 clients, and seeing how much time I’m working for each one needs to be easier than doing manual filters/exports through each of the boards/projects.

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @amywong

I recommend to try the app Timesheet Pro by Work Perfect.
